result.stdout:
ESH Package Manager for .NET and .NET Core Projects

Usage: esh [options] [command]

Options:
  -h|--help  Show help information

Commands:
  add        Add package from local git repository
  install    Install package from Git repository
  list       List esh packages
  remove     Remove esh packages from package list
  update     Update package(s) from Git repository

Run 'esh [command] --help' for more information about a command.
